product_name: Taurus Smart Recliner Bed With Headboard
description_short: Experience intelligent sleep with customisable positions, one-touch presets, and premium comfort features in this advanced electric bed.
frame_material: High-quality steel with black powder coating

faq_specs.question: Does the bed come with pre-set positions?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, pre-set positions like zero-gravity and anti-snore are available.

faq_specs.question: What is the weight capacity of the bed?
faq_specs.answer: The bed can support up to 300 kg, depending on the size.

notes_observed: Most expensive product in the catalog. Includes 2 USB ports + zero-gravity + anti-snore. Note: og:price showed ₹55,249 but schema returned ₹72,249 — possibly base/current price differ from variant pricing.
